diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thank you for calling HoYoverse Player Support. How can I help you today?
[Caller] Hi, I'm calling about my daughter's account. She's 12 and she spent 520 dollars on Genesis Crystals over three days without my permission. I called yesterday and was basically told to dispute it with my bank. I need somebody to actually help me here.
[Agent] Helen, first, I can hear how concerning this must be. A 12-year-old making a 520 dollar charge without your knowledge is exactly the kind of situation our Minor Account Protection Policy is built for, and we absolutely have a path to make this right. I'm sorry you were told otherwise yesterday.
[Caller] Okay. Thank you. What do I need to do?
[Agent] Let me walk you through it. I'll need to verify you're the guardian on the account, then I can open an expedited refund ticket. Can I start with the UID?
[Caller] 705532108. It's Emma Williams.
[Agent] Thank you. I have Emma's account pulled up, and I can see the guardian email on file matches the name you gave me. For guardian verification on a minor account, per our policy I need three things. First, I'll ask you to upload a government-issued ID in Emma's guardian's name to the ticket I'm about to open. Second, I need to confirm Emma's date of birth. Third, I need the last four digits of the payment method that was used for the purchases.
[Caller] Her date of birth is February 8th, 2014. The card ends in 7712.
[Agent] That matches what we have on file. Thank you. I'm opening compensation ticket CMP9921 right now for a full 520 USD refund on order ORD202604170012, routed through expedited Minor Account review. You'll receive an email within the next few minutes with a secure upload link for the government ID. Once we have that, the refund will be issued to the original payment method within 3 to 5 business days, not the standard 5 to 7.
[Caller] That's such a relief. Thank you.
[Agent] Of course. And Helen, I want to also make sure this can't happen again. Emma's account doesn't currently have parental controls enabled. I can book you a free 15-minute setup call with our Family Safety team where they'll walk you through the spending limit, the purchase PIN, and the daily playtime controls. Would that be helpful?
[Caller] Yes, please, absolutely.
[Agent] I've scheduled it for tomorrow at 10 AM your local time. You'll get a calendar invite to this same email. In the meantime I've temporarily set Emma's account to block new purchases, so she can't accidentally spend anything else before the controls are configured.
[Caller] Thank you so much. This is night and day from yesterday.
[Agent] I'm really glad we got here. The refund ticket reference again is CMP9921, the upload link will hit your inbox within 5 minutes, and the parental-controls call is tomorrow at 10 AM. Anything else I can help with today?
[Caller] No, that's everything. Thank you.
[Agent] You're very welcome, Helen. Take care.
